title: 色づく秋のマーベラス☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Wow! The tree leaves have all turned to their fall
colors! They look so marvelous swaying in the
wind. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Gracious, they really get your emotions going,
don't they? It makes me feel kind of lonesome...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Why would you feel that way? These colors
are so marvelous to look at! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's true, but seeing them reminds me that
winter's right around the corner.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't feel lonely with all this fun in sight!
Look, just step on the leaves like this...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Crunch, crunch! ♪ Crunchy, crunch! ♪ You'll hear
the most marvelous sound. ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, I see. With your marvelous touch, I suppose
you can find fun just about anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Come on, let's crunch them together! Crunch,
crunch! ♪ Crunchy, crunch! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to pass. I'd rather leave them intact for
the kiddies.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hm? This feeling... It brings back so many
memories. It kind of... feels good.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: I know, right?! Fall leaves are truly marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Now let's dive into this leaf pile! On the count of
three! One, two...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You really startled me there... Then again, you've
always been unpredictable.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
They're so marvelous and pretty! ☆ So
marvelously nice to the touch! ★ I love the
marvelous nature of fall! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Can't help yourself, huh? You blew my
pensive fall mood right away.
